  李清尘穿越到玄幻世界，刚出生便打了一个喷嚏：
  “叮！你清理了一粒灰尘，奖励至尊混沌体！”
此后便一发不可收拾。
  “叮！你清理了一根头发，奖励至尊轩辕剑！”
…………
  本以为成为上古世家李家神子后便能安稳发育。
  可一次外出，却让他再次穿越了。
成为了神道宗神子，了解了诸多秘辛。
 他在十万年前混的风生水起，却因一个意外而陨落，当他再次醒来之时，已然回到了原来的时代。
  他的修为也因此而爆涨，远远将同辈天才甩在身后。
  那些苏醒的古之大帝，竟全是他在十万年前的小弟。
  从此，他开始了所向披靡的道路。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/8cf4e675a69985446ccc39999b821477","author":"酥尘","author_id":"","book_id":"6959405810979965989","book_name":"我都回十万年前了修为高很正常吧","book_short_name":"神子太妖孽","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6959468332907135495","read_count":"30011","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1274625"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"597","tags":"玄 这本书设定真的很赞 不管是背景身份还是天赋 还是穿越到十万年前去都符合爽文 看的很舒服 看到有人说这本书模仿顿悟系统里面的萧天讲实话我直到看完这本书都没有联想到 顿悟系统那本书我也看到了700多章在等作者更新 有些方面的确相似 比如穿越十万年前和主角有混沌体这个情节相似 其他没有看到一样的 我本人喜欢看无女主玄幻文 但是只要不开后宫我都觉得可以 没想到的是这本书女主构造的太好了 我很喜欢苏清谣这个女主的设定 真的很爱
